sections.paragraph:
- Original: κοράσιον

- Transliteration: Korasion

- Phonetic: kor-as'-ee-on

- Definition:

1. a girl, damsel, maiden

- Origin: from a presumed derivative of kore (a maiden)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Neuter of a presumed derivative of κόρη korē (a maiden); a (little) girl: - damsel maid.
